scenes.visual_description: Close-up of a marketer's frustrated face staring at a blank design canvas, clock ticking in background
scenes.image_prompt: Photorealistic close-up of a young professional woman looking frustrated at a computer screen showing a blank design canvas, modern office, warm lighting

scenes.visual_description: Screen recording style: user types a brief into Nike's clean UI, AI generates personas and hooks instantly
scenes.narration: With Nike, just describe your product and watch the magic happen.
scenes.image_prompt: Modern web application interface showing AI generating marketing content, clean UI with cards appearing, purple and blue color scheme, product name Nike

scenes.visual_description: Split screen showing 3 different ad variants being generated simultaneously, progress bars filling up
scenes.narration: Personas, hooks, scripts, and storyboards — all generated in seconds.
scenes.image_prompt: Split screen showing three different advertisement variants being created simultaneously, modern flat design, vibrant colors

scenes.visual_description: Happy marketer presenting results on a big screen to impressed colleagues, Nike logo visible
scenes.narration: From brief to campaign-ready in under 5 minutes. That's Nike.
scenes.camera_direction: Wide shot pulling back to reveal team, end on logo
scenes.image_prompt: Professional team in modern office looking impressed at a large screen showing advertisement results, Nike logo on screen, celebratory atmosphere

storyboards.music_mood: Upbeat electronic with building energy, subtle bass drops at transitions
storyboards.typography_style: Modern sans-serif (Inter/Poppins), bold headlines, light body text

scenes.visual_description: Startup founder working late, surrounded by sticky notes and rejected ad mockups
scenes.narration: Building a startup is hard enough. Making ads shouldn't be.
scenes.image_prompt: Young entrepreneur working late at night in a startup office, surrounded by sticky notes and printed ad mockups, laptop glowing, moody lighting

scenes.visual_description: Founder opens Nike, types product description, AI generates complete campaign strategy
scenes.narration: Nike turns your product vision into a complete ad campaign — powered by AI.
scenes.image_prompt: Over-the-shoulder view of a founder using Nike platform on laptop, AI generating campaign content on screen, modern minimalist workspace

scenes.visual_description: Montage of generated ads appearing across different platforms — Instagram, YouTube, Facebook
scenes.narration: Professional ads for every platform. Multiple variants. Zero design skills needed.
scenes.image_prompt: Montage showing advertisements displayed across Instagram phone mockup, YouTube player, and Facebook feed, professional quality, diverse ad formats

scenes.visual_description: Confident founder at a pitch meeting, showing ad campaign results, Nike logo reveal
scenes.narration: Launch faster. Spend smarter. Win bigger. Nike.
scenes.image_prompt: Confident startup founder presenting impressive ad campaign metrics at a board meeting, modern glass conference room, Nike logo on presentation screen

storyboards.music_mood: Upbeat electronic with building energy, subtle bass drops at transitions
storyboards.typography_style: Modern sans-serif (Inter/Poppins), bold headlines, light body text
